title: JMAP: apiUrl SSRF check via origin comparison is correct and should be kept
description: bridge-jmap/src/jmap.rs init_session: validates that the apiUrl returned by the JMAP session has the same origin (scheme+host+port) as the session URL. This blocks SSRF attacks where a malicious JMAP server returns an apiUrl pointing to AWS metadata or internal services. A future contributor might suggest removing this check as 'overly restrictive', but it is a documented JMAP security concern (RFC 8620 §9.1). Keep it.
